import json, re, unicodedata, pandas as pd, textwrap, itertools, math, sys, os, statistics

quran_path = "/mnt/data/file-RhatJL6W5hpishQfBLfQ2a-quranic_verses.json"
hadith_path = "/mnt/data/file-GKgoPWB6fR896BnuZfjrBZ-six_hadith_books.json"

with open(hadith_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    hadith = json.load(f)

len(hadith), list(hadith[0].keys())[:10]

# Build a search index with normalized text (remove diacritics, punctuation, tatweel, unify hamza)
import re, unicodedata

def normalize_ar(text):
    if not isinstance(text, str):
        return ""
    # remove tatweel
    text = text.replace("ـ", "")
    # unify hamza forms
    text = re.sub("[إأٱآا]", "ا", text)
    text = re.sub("[ېىٰ]", "ي", text)
    text = re.sub("[ؤئ]", "ء", text)
    # remove diacritics
    diacritics = re.compile(r"[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u0670\u06D6-\u06ED]")
    text = diacritics.sub("", text)
    # remove punctuation
    text = re.sub(r"[^\w\s\u0621-\u064A]", " ", text)
    # collapse spaces
    text = re.sub(r"\s+", " ", text).strip()
    return text

for rec in hadith:
    rec["matn"] = rec.get("Matn") or rec.get("hadithTxt") or ""
    rec["matn_norm"] = normalize_ar(rec["matn"])

def search(term, limit=20):
    tn = normalize_ar(term)
    hits = [r for r in hadith if tn in r["matn_norm"]]
    return hits[:limit], len(hits)

phrase1 = "إذا انقضت عدتها فليست بمحرمة"
phrase2 = "إذا انقضت عدتها"
phrase3 = "فليست بمحرمة"

for ph in [phrase1, phrase2, phrase3]:
    hits, n = search(ph, 50)
    print(ph, "=>", n)
    for r in hits[:10]:
